CustomField.description:
INTEGRATION FIELD: Field used by Gainsight for triggering CTAs (LMS 3/11/2021: NEED TO CHECK IF THIS IS STILL TRUE)
LMS 3/11/2021: this field is no longer in user; CS used this field for forecasting PRIOR to using Gainsight Renewal Center
CustomField.inlineHelpText: To Be Deprecated: ARR of the next renewal
CustomField.label: Renewal ARR
